javascript:(function(C%2CL)%7Btypeof%20exports%3D%3D%22object%22%26%26typeof%20module%3C%22u%22%3FL(exports)%3Atypeof%20define%3D%3D%22function%22%26%26define.amd%3Fdefine(%5B%22exports%22%5D%2CL)%3A(C%3Dtypeof%20globalThis%3C%22u%22%3FglobalThis%3AC%7C%7Cself%2CL(C.Sidetation%3D%7B%7D))%7D)(this%2Cfunction(C)%7B%22use%20strict%22%3Bconst%20L%3D%60%0A%3Ahost%20%7B%0A%20%20all%3A%20initial%3B%0A%7D%0A*%20%7B%0A%20%20box-sizing%3A%20border-box%3B%0A%20%20font-family%3A%20-apple-system%2C%20BlinkMacSystemFont%2C%20%22Segoe%20UI%22%2C%20%22PingFang%20SC%22%2C%20%22Hiragino%20Sans%20GB%22%2C%20sans-serif%3B%0A%7D%0A%0A%2F*%20----%20hover%20highlight%20----%20*%2F%0A.hover-box%20%7B%0A%20%20position%3A%20fixed%3B%0A%20%20display%3A%20none%3B%0A%20%20pointer-events%3A%20none%3B%0A%20%20border%3A%201px%20dashed%20rgba(79%2C%20140%2C%20255%2C%200.9)%3B%0A%20%20background%3A%20rgba(79%2C%20140%2C%20255%2C%200.08)%3B%0A%20%20z-index%3A%201%3B%0A%7D%0A%0A%2F*%20----%20selection%20box%20%2B%20handles%20----%20*%2F%0A.sel-box%20%7B%0A%20%20position%3A%20fixed%3B%0A%20%20display%3A%20none%3B%0A%20%20pointer-events%3A%20none%3B%0A%20%20border%3A%201.5px%20solid%20%234f8cff%3B%0A%20%20z-index%3A%202%3B%0A%7D%0A.sel-label%20%7B%0A%20%20position%3A%20absolute%3B%0A%20%20top%3A%20-24px%3B%0A%20%20left%3A%20-1.5px%3B%0A%20%20padding%3A%202px%208px%3B%0A%20%20background%3A%20%234f8cff%3B%0A%20%20color%3A%20%23fff%3B%0A%20%20font-size%3A%2011px%3B%0A%20%20line-height%3A%2016px%3B%0A%20%20border-radius%3A%204px%3B%0A%20%20white-space%3A%20nowrap%3B%0A%20%20pointer-events%3A%20none%3B%0A%7D%0A.handle%20%7B%0A%20%20position%3A%20absolute%3B%0A%20%20width%3A%2010px%3B%0A%20%20height%3A%2010px%3B%0A%20%20background%3A%20%23fff%3B%0A%20%20border%3A%201.5px%20solid%20%234f8cff%3B%0A%20%20border-radius%3A%202px%3B%0A%20%20pointer-events%3A%20auto%3B%0A%7D%0A.handle%5Bdata-dir%3D%22nw%22%5D%20%7B%20top%3A%20-6px%3B%20%20left%3A%20-6px%3B%20%20cursor%3A%20nwse-resize%3B%20%7D%0A.handle%5Bdata-dir%3 Toggle.classList.toggle(%22on%22%2Ct)%7DtogglePadMode()%7Bconst%20t%3D!this.padIndependent%3Bif(t)%7Bconst%20e%3Dthis.padXInput.value%7C%7C%220%22%2Cs%3Dthis.padYInput.value%7C%7C%220%22%2Co%3D%5Be%2Cs%2Ce%2Cs%5D%3Bthis.padSides.forEach((i%2Cn)%3D%3Ei.value%3Do%5Bn%5D)%7Delse%20this.padXInput.value%3Dthis.padSides%5B0%5D.value%7C%7C%220%22%2Cthis.padYInput.value%3Dthis.padSides%5B1%5D.value%7C%7C%220%22%2Cthis.applyPadding()%3Bthis.setPadMode(t)%7DapplyFill()%7Bconst%20t%3DMath.min(100%2CMath.max(0%2CparseFloat(this.fillPct.value)%7C%7C0))%3Bthis.host.setProps(%7B%22background-color%22%3APt(this.fillColor.value%2Ct%2F100)%7D)%7DapplyStroke()%7Bconst%20t%3DMath.max(0%2CparseFloat(this.strokeWidth.value)%7C%7C0)%3Bthis.host.setProps(%7B%22border-width%22%3A%60%24%7Bt%7Dpx%60%2C%22border-style%22%3A%22solid%22%2C%22border-color%22%3Athis.strokeColor.value%7D)%7DtoggleCssViewer()%7Bthis.cssOpen%3D!this.cssOpen%2Cthis.cssArrowEl.classList.toggle(%22open%22%2Cthis.cssOpen)%2Cthis.cssBody.classList.toggle(%22open%22%2Cthis.cssOpen)%2Cthis.cssOpen%26%26this.el%26%26this.renderCSS(this.el)%7DrenderCSS(t)%7Bthis.cssBody.replaceChildren()%3Bconst%20e%3DgetComputedStyle(t)%2Cs%3Du%3D%3Ee.getPropertyValue(u).trim()%2Co%3D(u%2Cb%2Cw%2CB)%3D%3Eu%3D%3D%3Db%26%26b%3D%3D%3Dw%26%26w%3D%3D%3DB%3Fu%3Au%3D%3D%3Dw%26%26b%3D%3D%3DB%3F%60%24%7Bu%7D%20%24%7Bb%7D%60%3A%60%24%7Bu%7D%20%24%7Bb%7D%20%24%7Bw%7D%20%24%7BB%7D%60%2Ci%3D%5B%5D%2Cn%3D(u%2Cb%2Cw)%3D%3E%7Bw%26%26i.push(%5Bu%2Cb%2Cw%5D)%7D%3Bif(n(%22%E5%AE%9A%E4%BD%8D%22%2C%22position%22%2Cs(%22position%22))%2Cs(%22position%22)!%3D%3D%22static%22)%7Bfor(const%20b%20of%5B%22top%22%2C%22right%22%2C%22bottom%22%2C%22left%22%5D)%7Bconst%20w%3Ds(b)%3Bw!%3D%3D%22auto%22%26%26n(%22%E5%AE%9A%E4%BD%8D%22%2Cb%2Cw)%7Dconst%20u%3Ds(%22z-index%22)%3Bu!%3D%3D%22auto%22%26%26n(%22%E5%AE%9A%E4%BD%8D%22%2C%22z-index%22%2Cu)%7Dconst%20a%3Ds(%22float%22)%3Ba!%3D%3D%22none%22%26%26n(%22%E5%AE%9A%E4%BD%8D%22%2C%22float%22%2Ca)%2Cn(%22%E7%9B%92%E6%A8%A1%E5%9E %26this.selected.includes(s)%3B!n%26%26!a%26%26this.select(%5Bs%5D)%2Cthis.drag%3D%7Bels%3Athis.selected%2CstartX%3Ae.clientX%2CstartY%3Ae.clientY%2Citems%3Anull%2Cmoved%3A!1%2CdownTarget%3As%7D%7D%2Cthis.onPointerUp%3De%3D%3E%7Bif(this.resize)%7Bconst%20s%3Dthis.resize%3Bthis.resize%3Dnull%2Cdocument.documentElement.style.cursor%3D%22%22%2Cthis.history.commit(s.rec%2Cs.before)%3Breturn%7Dif(this.drag)%7Bconst%20s%3Dthis.drag%3Bthis.drag%3Dnull%2Cthis.overlay.setGuides(null%2Cnull)%2Cdocument.documentElement.style.cursor%3D%22%22%2Cs.moved%26%26s.items%3Fthis.history.commitBatch(s.items.map((%7Brec%3Ao%2Cbefore%3Ai%7D)%3D%3E(%7Brec%3Ao%2Cbefore%3Ai%7D)))%3Athis.selected.length%3D%3D%3D1%26%26this.selected%5B0%5D%3D%3D%3Ds.downTarget%7C%7Cthis.select(%5Bs.downTarget%5D)%2Ce.preventDefault()%2Ce.stopPropagation()%7D%7D%2Cthis.blockEvent%3De%3D%3E%7Bthis.inOverlay(e)%7C%7Cthis.textEdit%26%26e.composedPath().includes(this.textEdit.el)%7C%7C(e.preventDefault()%2Ce.stopImmediatePropagation())%7D%2Cthis.onKeyDown%3De%3D%3E%7Bif(this.inOverlay(e))return%3Bif(this.textEdit)%7Be.key%3D%3D%3D%22Escape%22%26%26(e.preventDefault()%2Ce.stopPropagation()%2Cthis.commitTextEdit())%3Breturn%7Dconst%20s%3De.metaKey%7C%7Ce.ctrlKey%3Bif(e.key%3D%3D%3D%22Escape%22)%7Be.preventDefault()%2Ce.stopPropagation()%2Cthis.selected.length%3E0%3Fthis.select(%5B%5D)%3Athis.deactivate()%3Breturn%7Dif(s%26%26(e.key%3D%3D%3D%22z%22%7C%7Ce.key%3D%3D%3D%22Z%22))%7Be.preventDefault()%2Ce.stopPropagation()%2C(e.shiftKey%3Fthis.history.redo()%3Athis.history.undo())%26%26this.overlay.toast(e.shiftKey%3F%22%E9%87%8D%E5%81%9A%22%3A%22%E6%92%A4%E9%94%80%22)%3Breturn%7Dif(this.selected.length%3D%3D%3D0)return%3Bif(e.key%3D%3D%3D%22Delete%22%7C%7Ce.key%3D%3D%3D%22Backspace%22)%7Be.preventDefault()%2Ce.stopPropagation()%3Bconst%20l%3Dthis.selected.length%2Cc%3Dthis.selected.map(d%3D%3E%7Bconst%20h%3Dthis.history.ensure(d)%2Cp%3Dthis.history.snapshot(h)%3Breturn%20h.deleted%3D!0%2C%7Brec%3Ah%2Cbefore%3Ap%7D%7D)%3B ign%3Ae%3D%3Ethis.alignSelected(e)%2Cdistribute%3Ae%3D%3Ethis.distributeSelected(e)%7D)%2Cthis.history.onChange%3D()%3D%3E%7Bthis.syncUI()%2CRt(this.history.all())%7D%2Cthis.overlay.onHandleDown%3D(e%2Cs)%3D%3Ethis.startResize(e%2Cs)%2Cthis.restoreSession()%2Cthis.syncUI()%2Cthis.opts.autoStart%26%26this.activate()%7DrestoreSession()%7Bconst%20t%3DAt()%3Bif(!t%7C%7Ct.length%3D%3D%3D0)return%3Bconst%20e%3Dthis.history.restore(t)%3Be%3E0%26%26this.overlay.toast(%60%24%7Be%7D%20%E5%A4%84%E4%BF%AE%E6%94%B9%E5%9B%A0%E9%A1%B5%E9%9D%A2%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%84%E5%8F%98%E5%8C%96%E6%9C%AA%E8%83%BD%E6%81%A2%E5%A4%8D%60)%7Dactivate()%7Bthis.active%7C%7C(this.active%3D!0%2Cthis.savedUserSelect%3Ddocument.documentElement.style.userSelect%2Cdocument.documentElement.style.userSelect%3D%22none%22%2Cwindow.addEventListener(%22pointermove%22%2Cthis.onPointerMove%2C!0)%2Cwindow.addEventListener(%22pointerdown%22%2Cthis.onPointerDown%2C!0)%2Cwindow.addEventListener(%22pointerup%22%2Cthis.onPointerUp%2C!0)%2Cwindow.addEventListener(%22pointercancel%22%2Cthis.onPointerUp%2C!0)%2Cwindow.addEventListener(%22click%22%2Cthis.blockEvent%2C!0)%2Cwindow.addEventListener(%22keydown%22%2Cthis.onKeyDown%2C!0)%2Cthis.rafId%3DrequestAnimationFrame(this.loop)%2Cthis.syncUI())%7Ddeactivate()%7Bthis.active%26%26(this.commitTextEdit()%2Cthis.active%3D!1%2Cdocument.documentElement.style.userSelect%3Dthis.savedUserSelect%2Cdocument.documentElement.style.cursor%3D%22%22%2Cwindow.removeEventListener(%22pointermove%22%2Cthis.onPointerMove%2C!0)%2Cwindow.removeEventListener(%22pointerdown%22%2Cthis.onPointerDown%2C!0)%2Cwindow.removeEventListener(%22pointerup%22%2Cthis.onPointerUp%2C!0)%2Cwindow.removeEventListener(%22pointercancel%22%2Cthis.onPointerUp%2C!0)%2Cwindow.removeEventListener(%22click%22%2Cthis.blockEvent%2C!0)%2Cwindow.removeEventListener(%22keydown%22%2Cthis.onKeyDown%2C!0)%2CcancelAnimationFrame(this.rafId)%2Cthis.hovered%3Dnull%2Cthis.selected%3D%5B%5D%2Cthis.drag%3Dnull%2Cthis.resize%3Dnull%2Cthis.p ))%2Co%3DMath.min(...e.map(d%3D%3Ed.rect.left))%2Ci%3DMath.max(...e.map(d%3D%3Ed.rect.right))%2Cn%3DMath.min(...e.map(d%3D%3Ed.rect.top))%2Ca%3DMath.max(...e.map(d%3D%3Ed.rect.bottom))%2Cl%3D(o%2Bi)%2F2%2Cc%3D(n%2Ba)%2F2%3Bfor(const%7Brec%3Ad%2Crect%3Ah%7Dof%20e)%7Blet%20p%3D0%2Cg%3D0%3Bswitch(t)%7Bcase%22left%22%3Ap%3Do-h.left%3Bbreak%3Bcase%22right%22%3Ap%3Di-h.right%3Bbreak%3Bcase%22hcenter%22%3Ap%3Dl-(h.left%2Bh.width%2F2)%3Bbreak%3Bcase%22top%22%3Ag%3Dn-h.top%3Bbreak%3Bcase%22bottom%22%3Ag%3Da-h.bottom%3Bbreak%3Bcase%22vcenter%22%3Ag%3Dc-(h.top%2Bh.height%2F2)%3Bbreak%7D(p!%3D%3D0%7C%7Cg!%3D%3D0)%26%26(d.dx%2B%3Dp%2Cd.dy%2B%3Dg%2Cd.moved%3D!0%2CE(d))%7Dthis.history.commitBatch(s)%7DdistributeSelected(t)%7Bif(this.selected.length%3C3)return%3Bconst%20e%3Dthis.selected.map(h%3D%3E(%7Brec%3Athis.history.ensure(h)%2Crect%3Ah.getBoundingClientRect()%7D))%2Cs%3De.map((%7Brec%3Ah%7D)%3D%3E(%7Brec%3Ah%2Cbefore%3Athis.history.snapshot(h)%7D))%2Co%3D%5B...e%5D.sort((h%2Cp)%3D%3Et%3D%3D%3D%22h%22%3Fh.rect.left-p.rect.left%3Ah.rect.top-p.rect.top)%2Ci%3Do%5B0%5D.rect%2Cn%3Do%5Bo.length-1%5D.rect%2Ca%3Dt%3D%3D%3D%22h%22%3Fn.right-i.left%3An.bottom-i.top%2Cl%3Do.reduce((h%2Cp)%3D%3Eh%2B(t%3D%3D%3D%22h%22%3Fp.rect.width%3Ap.rect.height)%2C0)%2Cc%3D(a-l)%2F(o.length-1)%3Blet%20d%3Dt%3D%3D%3D%22h%22%3Fi.left%3Ai.top%3Bfor(const%7Brec%3Ah%2Crect%3Ap%7Dof%20o)%7Bconst%20g%3Dt%3D%3D%3D%22h%22%3Fp.width%3Ap.height%2Cx%3Dt%3D%3D%3D%22h%22%3Fp.left%3Ap.top%2Cy%3Dd-x%3By!%3D%3D0%26%26(t%3D%3D%3D%22h%22%3Fh.dx%2B%3Dy%3Ah.dy%2B%3Dy%2Ch.moved%3D!0%2CE(h))%2Cd%2B%3Dg%2Bc%7Dthis.history.commitBatch(s)%7Dcopy(t%2Ce)%7Bvar%20o%3Bconst%20s%3D()%3D%3E%7Bconst%20i%3Ddocument.createElement(%22textarea%22)%3Bi.value%3Dt%2Ci.style.position%3D%22fixed%22%2Ci.style.opacity%3D%220%22%2Cdocument.body.append(i)%2Ci.select()%2Cdocument.execCommand(%22copy%22)%2Ci.remove()%2Cthis.overlay.toast(e)%7D%3B(o%3Dnavigator.clipboard)!%3Dnull%26%26o.writeText%3Fnavigator.clipboard.writeText(t).then(()%3D%3Ethis.overlay.toast(e)%2C()%3D%3Es())%3As()%7DgetMarkdown()%7Breturn%20ot(this.history.all())%7DgetCSS()%7Breturn%20nt(this.history.all())%7Dget%20isActive()%7Breturn%20this.active%7Dundo()%7Breturn%20this.history.undo()%7Dredo()%7Breturn%20this.history.redo()%7DsyncUI()%7Bthis.history.prune()%2Cthis.toolbar.update(this.active%2Cthis.history.all())%2Cthis.propsPanel.sync()%7D%7Dfunction%20It(r)%7Breturn%20new%20it(r)%7DC.Sidetation%3Dit%2CC.init%3DIt%2CObject.defineProperty(C%2CSymbol.toStringTag%2C%7Bvalue%3A%22Module%22%7D)%7D)%3B%0A%3B(function()%7Bvar%20s%3Dwindow.Sidetation%7C%7CglobalThis.Sidetation%3Bif(document.querySelector('%5Bdata-sidetation%5D'))%7Bconsole.log('Sidetation%20already%20injected')%3Breturn%3B%7Dwindow.__sidetation%3Ds.init(%7BautoStart%3Atrue%7D)%3Bconsole.log('Sidetation%20ready%20%E2%80%94%20%E5%B7%B2%E8%87%AA%E5%8A%A8%E8%BF%9B%E5%85%A5%E7%BC%96%E8%BE%91%E6%A8%A1%E5%BC%8F')%3B%7D)()%3B
